tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"
(def by-id (zipmap ids fetched))
(def not-done (filter (fn [p] (not= "done" (:state (get by-id (:closes_linear p))))) closers))
(map (fn [p] {:pr (:number p) :linear (:closes_linear p) :state (:state (get by-id (:closes_linear p)))}) not-done)
"}
